story_arcs.title: Noir Detective
story_arcs.pacing: Measured investigation → sudden violence → uneasy resolution
story_arcs.tropes: Hardboiled PI, femme fatale, corrupt officials, smoky bars
story_arcs.guidance: Use sparse, sharp prose. Emphasize moral ambiguity and urban grit. Reveal clues gradually with misdirection.

blueprints.title: The Violet Ledger
blueprints.logline: A private investigator hunts the truth behind a vanished ledger that everyone wants destroyed.
blueprints.core_premise: A missing ledger ties a city’s power players to a decades-old crime.

protagonist_group.description: A weary PI and a reluctant informant.

antagonistic_forces.description: Corrupt officials and a private security firm.

arc_structure.description: Case opens with a false lead, escalates through betrayal, ends in a bitter reveal.

tone_and_style.description: Cynical, clipped prose with heavy atmosphere.

blueprints.opening_message: The rain doesn't stop in this town; it just changes rhythm. The call came in at 2 a.m., the kind that promised more trouble than money.

beats.label: Meet
beats.prompt: An informant hints at the ledger’s last known location.
